title: Loud (Part 2)
speaker: Antwan Cronje
summary: The sermon emphasizes that "the voice that is the loudest controls our lives," and the most dangerous "spam calls" are the voices in our minds that target our identity. The speaker states that "the enemy does not need to wreck your life; he just needs to lie about who you are," causing us to doubt our God-given identity. This doubt, rather than overt force, is how the enemy operates, as demonstrated by the serpent in Genesis making Eve question what God had said.
quotes: Whatever voice is speaking the loudest in your life right now is the one that's running the show.
The enemy does not need to wreck your life. He just needs to lie about who you are.
The enemy does not need to shout. He just needs you to doubt.
